title: maxillaria neglecta
intro: Maxillaria neglecta, also known as the "neglected maxillaria," is a type of orchid species native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Maxillaria neglecta include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used in traditional medicine, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any plant-based remedies.
